history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing right (`>`), and the goal is located down two cells and one cell to the right from my current position. To move toward the goal, I should first move forward along the corridor until I reach a position from where I can turn down and approach the goal. Moving forward is safe as the next cell is free floor (`.`).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right again, at position one cell to the right of the starting point. The goal is diagonally down-right from here, but the cell immediately down contains lava (`L`), which is unsafe to move onto. To approach the goal safely, I should turn downwards first by turning right to face down (`v`), then move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`). The cell immediately in front of me is lava (`L`), so moving forward is unsafe. To avoid the lava and still approach the goal, I should turn left to face right (`>`), then move forward along the clear path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), standing one cell above the lava. Moving forward is safe because the cell ahead is a floor cell (`.`). This will bring me closer to the goal which is diagonally down-right. Next step should be to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
After moving forward, I am now one cell to the left of the lava cell and still facing right (`>`). The next cell in front is the lava (`L`), which is not safe to enter. To avoid stepping into lava, I should turn down (`v`) to head towards the goal (`G`) which is located below.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`) and standing to the left of the lava cell. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal, which is located below in row 4. I should move forward to avoid the lava and approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`) and currently standing one cell above the lava cell (`L`) in the third row. Moving forward would cause me to step on lava, which I must avoid. Instead, I should turn right to face left (`<`) and navigate around the lava safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing left (`<`) next to the lava cell on the right. To safely reach the goal which is located below and to the right, I should move forward to bypass the lava safely on the left side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
